quotes.quote: The initial user input along with command outputs are treated as user messages to the Planner.
quotes.rationale: Command outputs are routed back to the planning component, establishing an execution-trace feedback channel.

quotes.quote: However, an incorrect heater-shaker module method name was used. Upon making this mistake, Coscientist uses the Docs searcher module to consult the OT-2 documentation. Next, Coscientist modifies the protocol to a corrected version, which ran successfully.
quotes.rationale: Shows an executability error detected and the candidate protocol revised until it ran successfully.

quotes.quote: Access to documentation enables us to provide sufficient information for Coscientist to conduct experiments in the physical world.
quotes.rationale: Documentation access is the reference against which protocol correctness in the physical setting is checked.

quotes.quote: For this investigation, we did not grant access to the internet.
quotes.rationale: The grounding corpus for this channel was explicitly restricted, bounding the information used to judge compliance.

quotes.quote: The normalized advantage values increase over time, suggesting that the model can effectively reuse the information obtained to provide more specific guidance on reactivity.
quotes.rationale: Measured outcome values are reused over time to steer subsequent experimental selections, i.e., search control.

quotes.quote: Although our setup is not yet fully automated (plates were moved manually), no human decision-making was involved.
quotes.rationale: Establishes that the physical loop ran without human decision-making, so the routing is computational.

quotes.quote: Despite our attempts to better formalize the scale, labelling is inherently subjective and so, may be different between the labelers.
quotes.rationale: Human scale-based labelling is used to assess outputs, and the source itself flags inter-labeler variability without reporting an agreement study.

diagnostics.consequence: Quality scores derived from this channel cannot be treated as reliable evidence of system capability, and any comparison built on them inherits unquantified labeler variance.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Despite our attempts to better formalize the scale, labelling is inherently subjective and so, may be different between the labelers.

diagnostics.statement: The human labelling channel is acknowledged by the source itself to be subjective and to vary between labelers, and no agreement or reliability study is reported for it.

diagnostics.consequence: The degree of closed-loop autonomy in the physical channel supports multiple readings, so closure of the experiment-outcome feedback path cannot be firmly established from the packet.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Although our setup is not yet fully automated (plates were moved manually), no human decision-making was involved.

diagnostics.statement: Automation of the physical loop is incomplete: plates were moved manually, and the claim that no human decision-making was involved is asserted rather than demonstrated by an audited trace.

diagnostics.consequence: The error-detection-and-repair rate is unknown, so silent failures that produce executable but incorrect protocols cannot be ruled out.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: However, an incorrect heater-shaker module method name was used. Upon making this mistake, Coscientist uses the Docs searcher module to consult the OT-2 documentation. Next, Coscientist modifies the protocol to a corrected version, which ran successfully.
The initial user input along with command outputs are treated as user messages to the Planner.

diagnostics.statement: No reliability study of any kind is reported for the execution-error correction channel; the packet offers only a single illustrative repair episode.

diagnostics.consequence: All reported validation remains internal and non-independent; no external party can verify executability, correction, or outcome-guided search claims.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Because of safety concerns, data, code and prompts will be only fully released after the development of US regulations in the field of artificial intelligence and its scientific applications.
For this investigation, we did not grant access to the internet.

diagnostics.statement: Data, code and prompts are withheld pending future regulation, so the validator channels cannot be independently exercised or replicated from this source.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Despite our attempts to better formalize the scale, labelling is inherently subjective and so, may be different between the labelers.

recommendations.proposed_action: Run and report a multi-labeler agreement study on the subjective quality scale, with per-item inter-rater statistics, before using those labels to support capability claims.

success_check.comparator_or_threshold: A pre-specified agreement threshold met on a documented sample, versus the current absence of any agreement statistic
success_check.evidence_needed: Published labelling protocol, per-item labels from at least two independent labelers, and computed agreement values
success_check.observable: Reported inter-labeler agreement statistic for the quality scale across independent labelers

exact_quotes.exact_quote: However, an incorrect heater-shaker module method name was used. Upon making this mistake, Coscientist uses the Docs searcher module to consult the OT-2 documentation. Next, Coscientist modifies the protocol to a corrected version, which ran successfully.
The initial user input along with command outputs are treated as user messages to the Planner.

recommendations.proposed_action: Report aggregate error-detection and repair statistics for the execution-feedback channel across all runs rather than a single illustrative correction episode.

success_check.comparator_or_threshold: Counts reported for all runs rather than one narrated case
success_check.evidence_needed: Execution logs with per-run error annotations and repair outcomes
success_check.observable: Rate of protocol errors detected and successfully corrected, and rate of undetected errors, over the full run set

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Although our setup is not yet fully automated (plates were moved manually), no human decision-making was involved.
Because of safety concerns, data, code and prompts will be only fully released after the development of US regulations in the field of artificial intelligence and its scientific applications.

recommendations.proposed_action: Publish an audited step-level log of the physical experiment loop that separates automated steps from manual plate handling, substantiating the claim that no human decision-making entered the loop.

success_check.comparator_or_threshold: Every decision point attributable to the system, with manual actions limited to non-decisional transport
success_check.evidence_needed: Timestamped instrument and planner logs released alongside the manual-handling procedure
success_check.observable: Step-level trace of the physical loop labelling each action as system-decided or human-performed

memory_structure: accumulated experimental information reused across iterations (normalized advantage values)
policy_type: LLM planner receiving command outputs as user messages
